description: Lock Computational Social Science & Predictive Modeling to empirical social-data prediction methods rather than broad advanced-AI or advanced-game-theory scope.

checks.reason: Supervised learning pipelines capture the prediction, training, validation, and held-out evaluation workflow used for social outcome modeling.
Probability and statistical inference capture the uncertainty and error-evaluation basis for predictive social modeling.
Broad advanced AI is too general as a direct prerequisite for the scoped empirical prediction workflow.
Advanced game theory is narrower than the node's computational social-data and outcome-prediction scope.
